message:
feat: expand conformance tests to 235 total + fix && || chain logic

Expanded conformance tests:
- opencode: 27→61 tests (add refactoring, error recovery, config mgmt,
  codebase search, monorepo patterns)
- zx: 21→35 tests (add 3-stage pipes, conditional patterns, touch,
  which, batch file ops, quoted strings, process tracking)
- simple-git: 20→36 tests (add tags, remotes, merge conflicts,
  large file ops)

Fix: && operator in chains now uses `continue` instead of `break`,
allowing `A && B || C` to correctly fall through to the || branch
when && fails (matches real shell behavior).

All 235 tests pass (67 unit + 168 conformance).
